SEABOURNE-CAST.title: Cast
SEABOURNE-CAST.description: Hooks a card in your discard pile. Each stack goes one card deeper. Removed when you Reel.
SEABOURNE-REEL.title: Reel
SEABOURNE-REEL.description: Pull the hooked card from your discard pile toward the most recent discard. Wet cards are played instead of entering your hand. Removes all Cast.
SEABOURNE-WET.title: Wet
SEABOURNE-WET.description: When reeled, this card is immediately played instead of entering your hand. Multiple Wet stacks replay it multiple times.
SEABOURNE-WATERWALL.title: Waterwall
SEABOURNE-WATERWALL.description: Blocks attack damage only if that hit is less than or equal to the current Waterwall.
SEABOURNE-TRANCE.title: Trance
SEABOURNE-TRANCE.description: The enemy keeps the same intent and loses 1 Trance each turn.
SEABOURNE-IMBUED.title: Imbued
SEABOURNE-IMBUED.description: This card is affected extra times by gem enhancements.
SEABOURNE-UNIMBUED.title: Unimbued
SEABOURNE-UNIMBUED.description: This card cannot be affected by gem enhancements.
SEABOURNE-GEM.title: Gem
SEABOURNE-GEM.description: A treasure The Seabourne can equip. Gems recharge at turn start and affect the first suitable card each turn.
SEABOURNE-GEM_SLOT.title: Gem Slot
SEABOURNE-GEM_SLOT.description: Lets The Seabourne hold one additional gem.
SEABOURNE-CANNON.title: Cannon
SEABOURNE-CANNON.description: Fires all loaded cannonballs when an effect tells you to fire it. If unloaded, it fires Scorching Water.
SEABOURNE-LOAD.title: Load
SEABOURNE-LOAD.description: Loads this cannonball into the Cannon instead of resolving its normal fired effect immediately.
SEABOURNE-SLIPPERY.title: Slippery
SEABOURNE-SLIPPERY.description: A defensive effect already present in STS2. This pack leaves its exact core-engine behavior to the game.
